titleStmt.title: SII 8.280: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 280. (A.R. No. 11 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarā jentiracoḻade vaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu vaṭakarai
virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu meṟkkānāṭṭu brahmade cam tiṭṭaikuṭiyāṉa tirucciṟṟam
palaccaruppetimaṅkalattu Ūruṭait tiruttāṉtoṉṟiśvara muṭaiya nāyanār koyilil deva
raṭiyāḷ Eṉṉaiyāṇṭiyāṉ nānūṟṟuvanaṅkai makaḷ perumāḷnācciyāna Ūruṭaiyaperumāḷ
naṅkai Inṉāyaṉār koyilil tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu nācciyārai tiruuṟsavam Eḻuṉtaruḷa U
lohattāl Eḻuntaruḷivittu Inṉācciyāṟku Amutupaṭikkum kaṟiamutu paṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa ve
ñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum Inṉāṭṭuk kāṇiyāḷan kaṭantai Ātittaṉ makaṉ palikaṉāṉa Irācarāca vaṅkāramutta
raiyaṉ pāṭikāvalāṉa nilaṅkaḷil canti muṉṟukkuc canti Onṟukku Arici nānāḻiyāka nāḷ Oṉṟuk
ku canti muṉṟiṉāl Arici kuṟuṇi nānāḻikkum kaṟiamutu viñcaṉaṅkaḷukku In(ṉ)nāyanār tevatānamā
ṉa Uḷḷūrilum piṭākaikaḷilum naṉcai nilaṅkaḷilum Ivvūr pāṭikāval koṇṭu varukiṟa ṉance
nilaṅkaḷil pāṭikāvalil Innāyaṉārkku muṉpu Ivarkaḷ tamappanār tiruattacāmattukku A
mutupaṭikku viṭṭa nellu nūṟṟu Irupatin kalamum kal veṭṭu nikki nikkiuṭaiya nellile Innā
cciyāṟkku Āṭṭu nānūṟṟu Eṇpatiṉ kala nellum Inta tavaṟ cel
vatākavum . Ippāṭikāvalukku yā Space containing about 10 letters is much wern out.
kiye koḷvatākavum . Ippaṭi cey �kavum
�lluvār Uṇṭākil vallavaraiyaṉ cat
Digital edition of SII 8.280 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
